welcome: Welcome! Tap the button to sign up 🏁
greeting: Hi {name}! Let's get you on the track 🏁
ask-self: Tap to share your number, or just type your details — name, phone or email, and birthday. You can send them all in one message.
ask-contact: A phone or email to reach them? Share a contact or type it.
add-another: Who's next? Attach their contact 📎 or type their details.
done: All set 🏁 See you at the track!
